summary: VERIFIED: Route conflict FIX is working. Accounting voucher endpoints now use /api/accounting-vouchers/* instead of /api/vouchers/*. All accounting module features tested successfully: Create vouchers (Payment, Receipt, Journal), Approve/Reject workflow, Day Book, Cash Book, Trial Balance, Ledger Management.
passed_tests: GET /api/accounting-vouchers/types - Returns 6 voucher types (payment, receipt, journal, contra, sales, purchase)
POST /api/accounting-vouchers - Creates payment voucher with line items (PMT/2025-26/0002 created)
GET /api/accounting-vouchers - Lists accounting vouchers (not promotional vouchers)
GET /api/accounting-vouchers/{id} - Returns voucher detail with approval history
POST /api/accounting-vouchers/{id}/approve - Approves voucher and posts to ledgers
GET /api/books/day-book - Shows approved vouchers with total debit/credit
GET /api/books/cash-book - Shows cash transactions with opening/closing balance
Debit/Credit validation - 400 error when totals don't match
UI - Voucher Entry page loads with voucher list and statistics
UI - Create New Voucher dialog works with voucher type selection
UI - Accounting Books page shows Day Book, Cash Book, Bank Book, Trial Balance tabs
UI - Cash Book shows cash transactions with balances
UI - Ledger Management shows hierarchical group tree and ledger list
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Route conflict resolved - accounting vouchers now use /api/accounting-vouchers/* endpoints
Frontend VoucherEntryPage.js correctly updated to use /api/accounting-vouchers/* endpoints
Double-entry bookkeeping validation working - debit must equal credit
seed_data_creation: Created test vouchers during testing: PMT/2025-26/0002 (approved), RCT/2025-26/0001 (rejected), multiple test vouchers for approve/reject workflow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accounting module is fully functional. Route conflict FIXED by renaming endpoints from /api/vouchers to /api/accounting-vouchers. Test ledgers available: Main Cash Account (ddde76a6-6aa0-4643-bc02-c8df153ddb53), Office Supplies Expense (5250bc29-1572-4c1a-8c70-cab323a1aa48), HDFC BANK. All voucher CRUD, approval workflow, and accounting books working.
